lines.speaker: Zaff
lines.text: Would you like to buy or sell some staffs?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, thank you.

lines.speaker: Zaff
lines.text: Well, 'stick' your head in again if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Huh, terrible pun! You just can't get the 'staff' these days!

lines.speaker: Zaff
lines.text: Would you like to buy or sell some staffs? Or is there something else you need?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you any extra stock of battlestaffs I can buy?

lines.speaker: Zaff
lines.text: For you, my friend, maybe. Take a look in the barrel in the corner.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have another ring?

lines.speaker: Zaff
lines.text: There's still one in your inventory, [player name]!

lines.speaker: Zaff
lines.text: Go and get the one that's in your bank, [player name]!

lines.speaker: Zaff
lines.text: I would be happy to give you another ring, but I'm afraid you don't have enough inventory space for it!

lines.speaker: Zaff
lines.text: Yes, of course, [player name]. Here you are. Please bear in mind that this ring has no charges left with which to summon me, however.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you make me a staff?

lines.speaker: Zaff
lines.text: Make you a staff? With what?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found this magical essence when I was out on my adventures. I'd like to attach it to a battlestaff, but I'm not sure how to do that myself.

lines.speaker: Zaff
lines.text: Let me see this essence.

lines.speaker: Zaff
lines.text: Interesting, very interesting. This would indeed make a very nice staff.

lines.speaker: Zaff
lines.text: You could make it yourself if you wanted. Just attach the essence to a battlestaff.

lines.speaker: Zaff
lines.text: Nevertheless, I'm happy to do it for you if you like.

lines.speaker: Zaff
lines.text: I'll attach it to a battlestaff for you if you are willing to pay me 50,000 coins. How does that sound?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, please.

lines.speaker: Zaff
lines.text: Thank you, here you go. I'm not sure what it does, but it feels pretty magical.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, I don't have enough coins. I'll come back later.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, thanks.

lines.speaker: Zaff
lines.text: I'll be here if you change your mind.
